summary: Tested 3 new increments on the Yashashree Rathi Creator Media Kit static React landing: (1) Reveal fade-in for WhyMe + Packages + Extras, (2) LeadForm Quick Pitch mailto flow incl. required validation, (3) centered yellow pill eyebrow in Contact footer. Also ran a smoke regression (count-up, tier CTAs, header CTA presence, mobile responsiveness, hamburger). All 24+ assertions PASSED. No bugs found.
tests_executed: contact-eyebrow exists, contains "Let's Build Together", inline-flex mx-auto centered
Reveal: why-card-01/02/03 reach opacity=1, transform=none after scroll
Reveal: tier-card-seed/growth/trust reach opacity=1 after scroll
Reveal: extras-add-ons, extras-retainer, extras-what-i-don't-do reach opacity=1
LeadForm required validation: empty submit does NOT trigger mailto navigation (button text remains 'Send Pitch')
LeadForm valid submit: captured mailto URL via Playwright page.on('request') listener
- body contains 'Acme Co', 'founder@acme.com', and 'AI productivity tool'
- button text changes to 'Opening mail…' immediately after click
Count-up regression: 900K+, 25,000+, 950+, 800+, 300+ all rendered after stats reach view
Tier CTAs (seed/growth/trust) all scroll #contact into view on click
Header CTAs exist: header-cta, mobile-cta, hero-cta-packages, hero-cta-contact
Mobile 390x844: no horizontal scroll (bodyW=390, winW=390) at top AND at #contact
Mobile: Send Pitch button is full-width (btn_w=300 vs form inner ~302)
Mobile: lead-name and lead-email stack vertically (sm:grid-cols-2 collapses to 1col)
Mobile: hamburger (mobile-menu-toggle) is clickable and opens nav drawer
critical_code_review_comments: Reveal.jsx: Solid implementation — IntersectionObserver disconnect() after first reveal is the right call. threshold 0.15 is reasonable.

LeadForm.jsx: Builds mailto URL correctly with encodeURIComponent on both subject and body; em-dash (—) used in subject. Required validation via HTML5 'required' attr blocks empty submits before onSubmit's trim guard.
Contact.jsx: Eyebrow pill uses inline-flex + mx-auto inside text-center parent → properly centered. Glowing yellow dot via boxShadow rgba(255,213,0,0.7) looks correct.

Note (not a bug): data-testid for the 'What I Don't Do' extras card resolves to extras-what-i-don't-do (apostrophe preserved) because the title is replaced only on whitespace. The review-request spec wrote it as extras-what-i-don-t-do but the actual rendered testid is extras-what-i-don't-do. Either spec or code could be aligned — current code is fine functionally.
test_credentials: None required (static landing page, no backend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mailto navigation in Chromium cannot be intercepted via Object.defineProperty(window.location, 'href', ...) — it throws 'Cannot redefine property: href' on both the instance and Location.prototype. The reliable way to capture mailto URLs is to attach a page.on('request') listener BEFORE clicking submit; Chromium emits a request event for the mailto: navigation even though no HTTP request is made and it lands the page at about:blank briefly. Use this pattern: `def on_req(r): if 'mailto' in r.url: captured.append(r.url); page.on('request', on_req)`.
